blocks.heading: About Me
blocks.body: Hello! I'm Vaibhav Raj, an AI/ML Engineer at ATH Infosystems. I graduated BCA from BCIIT (GGSIPU, CGPA 8.691) in 2025 and joined ATH in November, where I currently ship real-time stability analytics on the SINTRA platform — an engagement with a European industrial IoT client. Phase 1 of 10 delivered and approved.

blocks.heading: From SplitIT to SINTRA
blocks.body: My first project at ATH was SplitIT, a fintech automation platform built on Stripe ACH and Financial Connections that splits incoming income by user-defined rules. It was technically outside my core AI/ML scope, but I took end-to-end ownership, delivered it, and that earned me the SINTRA assignment — a multi-phase ML & data engineering engagement that's now my primary focus.

blocks.heading: What I Work On
blocks.body: Day-to-day, I live in Python, pandas, InfluxDB, and Grafana — building ETL pipelines that turn millions of raw sensor positions into scored, classified, actionable signal. I care about architecture that separates concerns (business logic stays in pipelines, dashboards stay dumb and fast), observability that tells you when things degrade, and the occasional LLM-powered tool that makes the whole workflow faster.
